title: Catch Cron Daily Files That Will Be Skipped
stdout:
::fixture-ready::
$ find /etc/cron.daily -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\n' | sort
apt-compat
db.backup
dpkg
logrotate
::exit-code::0
$ run-parts --test /etc/cron.daily
/etc/cron.daily/apt-compat
/etc/cron.daily/dpkg
/etc/cron.daily/logrotate
::exit-code::0
